message:
Fix getCurrentUser to trigger auto-refresh on expired tokens

Updates getCurrentUser() to call getAccessToken() first, which handles
the auto-refresh logic. This ensures that commands using getCurrentUser()
benefit from automatic token refresh.

Also updates tests to explicitly set refresh_token: undefined when testing
expired credentials without network calls, ensuring tests don't attempt
refresh requests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
